creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
For the record... :)

----- Forwarded message from Matthias Andree <matthias.andree@gmx.de> -----

Date: Tue, 17 Jun 2008 17:07:37 +0200
From: Matthias Andree <matthias.andree@gmx.de>
To: Wesley Shields <wxs@FreeBSD.org>
Subject: Re: ports/124372: [PATCH] archivers/rpm: unbreak build

Wesley Shields schrieb:

> I'm unable to reproduce this given the circumstances listed above.
> Given the port does not break in a tinderbox, jail, or anywhere else for
> that matter I'd like to close this PR.  Any objections?

If it's not urgent, I'd like to give this another shot on a 6.3 with all
gettext-dependent packages recompiled recently. If you don't hear back from
me within 10 days, feel free to close it.

Thanks.

-- 
Matthias Andree

----- End forwarded message -----
